sentences.translationEn: The little girl likes chocolate a lot.

sentences.arabic: تَطْلُبُ مِنْ أَبِيهَا قِطْعَةً كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan traži komad od svog oca.
sentences.translationEn: She asks her father for a piece every day.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ لَهَا: قِطْعَةٌ وَاحِدَةٌ فَقَطْ بَعْدَ الطَّعَامِ.
sentences.translation: On joj kaže: Samo jedan komad nakon jela.
sentences.translationEn: He tells her: Only one piece after the meal.

sentences.translation: Ona se nasmije i uzme komad i pojede ga radosno.
sentences.translationEn: She laughs and takes the piece and eats it happily.
